title: Plant Farms
description: Condenses plant farms into a singular block.
body:
### **THESE UPDATES ONLY APPLY TO THE 1.21.1 VERSION. I AM ACTIVELY WORKING ON V2.0.0 FOR 1.21.3/.4 BUT MOJANG HAS MADE IT VERY CHALLENGING TO DATA GENERATE. BECAUSE OF THIS, IT WILL MOST LIKELY BE SEVERAL MONTHS UNTIL I AM ABLE TO RELEASE AN UPDATE FOR 1.21.3. DO NOT COMPLAIN THAT STUFF ISN'T WORKING FOR 1.21.3 IF YOU HAVE NOT READ THIS! **

Similar to my Mob Farms mod, this condenses automatic plant farms into a singular block. 
Most Overworld plants (underwater, underground, and above ground) are included. 
The two Nether trees and Nether warts are included.
The Chorus Fruit from the End is also included.
There's also a golden carrot farm included, created when you combine the Carrot farm and a gold nugget.
- Most of the farms have a tool on it.
- Farms that have a tool on it will default to wooden when pulled from the creative inventory.
- The tree farms have an axe on them. 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8504a71e006b1a68e2b720ec06a19b21ef403fdf.png)

- The crop farms have a hoe on them.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fcb4ccd0417135944a28e57dbd2bf63b3d5b8e9f.png)
- All the farms have a new recipe
  - The Tree farms recipe:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1dfdc1f20ef625cb0fa3615f2a3f7220fe26eeb.png)

  - The Crop Farms recipe:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06c546797c1b5e4b5aacd92bae1bd2eedf7dfe60.png)

  - Everything else (those are still glass panes. They're just invisible because they're clear):

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57082e9220e46453927d47517b3d198bd53a3325.png)

  - The old recipe will still work.
- All the farms that have a tool can be upgraded using materials used to make the tool (i.e., diamond, netherite, gold, etc.)
  
  ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca039fd58d9b9c3d90ff3c19f11d1d2fd8b3e2f.png)
  
  -Downgrading is NOT 
  
- You can add enchantments that can normally be applied to the tool to the block by combining them in the crafting table.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d68e54a64526be48d780c51a6799c114f5e1e10.png)

  - You can’t put multiple books in the crafting table at once, but you can stack enchantments on one book, then combine that. If the enchantments are compatible with the tool, it will work.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90d84c6bdca747d17c39c5a18a3d3e8b8614d047.png)

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd6ebc182ca0ffe4ca9183d8b4962d1f049a79ec.png)

- Putting a farm with an enchantment on it with nothing else will remove ALL enchantments

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3493471e50bd489e3168f5086860c1c661c41630.png)

JEI or something similar is suggested to see the crafting recipes.

As Mojang adds new plants, I'll try to keep updating this mod.

Join my Discord server to get early access to my mods before they are released anywhere else, as well as have the ability to help me develop new mods: https://discord.gg/XCrMsrXC3a
